finding_results.notes: Kept Kashem's opening social laugh and one later torn laugh, then replaced the repeated mid-scene laugh beats with distinct physical reactions and tightened Halima's reassurance back toward her natural contracted pressure register.

summary: Revised Kashem's unraveling so the scene no longer defaults to repeated laugh-tags, using varied physical and vocal beats to track his status panic while preserving the chapter's suspicion-without-full-revelation endpoint.
